users.title: Platform users
users.subtitle: Accounts in root.platform.security.users. Select a user in the tree or list — edit properties in the object inspector.
users.adminOnly: User management is available to admin only.

roles.subtitle: RBAC roles in root.platform.security.roles. Select a role in the tree or list — edit properties in the object inspector.
roles.adminOnly: Role management is available to admin only.

role.readonlyHint: Editing is available to admin only.

createRole.name: Role name

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Namespace root.tenant.{id}.platform.*. Assign tenant to operator users to scope their subtree.
tenants.adminOnly: Multi-tenant is available to admin only.
acl.title: Object access
acl.subtitle: Per-object ACL for {{path}}. If no rules exist — global RBAC applies. Admin always has full access.
acl.empty: No restrictions — object is visible to all roles with global access.
